_note: Briefs waiting for the active brief to complete. Pop index 0 and move to autoresearch-active.json when the current one archives.

queue.question: What is the minimum-viable UR (Exterior-Individual) protocol for a Turquoise-vision founder operating with only 3 hours of uninterrupted deep work per day, chronic energy-demand mismatch (self-rated 2/5), and sub-24h execution weakness (self-rated 2/5)? Design a daily/weekly protocol that fits inside existing bandwidth (does not add net time) and is evidence-based across sleep, breath, movement, nutrition, and cognitive-load management. Acceptance criterion: the protocol is executable by someone whose body-line scores 3/10 and who currently does only strength 1x and breath 1x per week, without requiring willpower as the limiting resource.
queue.metric: body-line delta (3→6) within 90 days; energy-demand match (2→4); 24h-execution (2→4) — using the same self-rating scale at 30/60/90 day checkpoints
sources: Wilber/Patten/Leonard/Morelli — Integral Life Practice (2008) — Body module protocols
Andrew Huberman podcast protocols (sleep, breath, light)
Peter Attia — Outlive (zone 2, strength, VO2max, stability)
Nick Littlehales — Sleep (R90 polyphasic method for high-demand operators)
Kelly McGonigal — The Upside of Stress / HeartMath — HRV protocols
Centaurion identity/BASELINE-INTEGRAL.md (Light baseline, source of operator constraints)
iteration_plan: 1. Map current operator state (3 dw-hrs, 2/5 energy match, strength 1x + breath 1x, movement L8, meditation 3x/wk)
2. Identify the 3-5 highest-leverage evidence-based interventions that fit inside existing day (not ON TOP of it)
3. Design daily protocol (morning anchor + micro-protocols + evening wind-down) with total time budget < 60 min/day
4. Design weekly protocol (strength 2-3x, zone2 1-2x, 1 deload day, 1 shadow/integration block)
5. Define 30/60/90-day review cadence + measurable leading indicators (HRV, sleep score, subjective energy, deep-work hours achieved, 24h-execution rate)
constraints: MUST NOT require more than 60 min/day additional time
MUST NOT assume willpower as a limiting resource — protocol should be executable on low-energy days
MUST be compatible with European time zone and AOB/BuilderBee meeting loads
MUST preserve the 3 existing deep-work hours (non-negotiable)

ties_to.baseline_finding: Leverage point: Somatic line 3/10 + AOB scope depleting UR capacity

queue.question: What is the minimum-viable Claude Code single-point-of-failure mitigation plan for an operator whose entire cognitive infrastructure depends on Claude Code being available? Evaluate: local Claude Code instance (if supported), Codex / GPT-5-Codex / Gemini CLI as redundant runtime, specification of a 'degraded mode' that continues with reduced capability if Claude is unreachable, and recommended trigger thresholds for switching modes.
queue.metric: mean time to recovery if Claude Code is unreachable — target < 10 minutes to degraded mode, < 1 hour to full alternate runtime

ties_to.baseline_finding: L18 — Claude Code = single point of failure
